question_text: A person pushes a shopping trolley with a force of 50 N. The friction force on the trolley is 20 N. Calculate the net force on the trolley.
explanation: Net force is calculated by subtracting the friction force from the pushing force. Net force = 50 N − 20 N = 30 N. Since the net force is not zero, the forces are unbalanced and the trolley will accelerate in the direction of the push.
